csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEngine.UIElements; public class Script : UnityEditor.Editor { public static string Main() { var docs = Object.FindObjectsOfType<UIDocument>(); foreach (var doc in docs) { if (doc.rootVisualElement == null) continue; var announcement = doc.rootVisualElement.Q("SplashAnnouncement"); if (announcement != null) { var closeBtn = announcement.Q<Button>("btn-close"); if (closeBtn != null) { using (var evt = ClickEvent.GetPooled()) { evt.target = closeBtn; closeBtn.SendEvent(evt); } return "closed announcement"; } } var loginBtn = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<Button>("btn-login"); if (loginBtn != null) return "found btn-login"; var continueBtn = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<Button>("btn-continue"); if (continueBtn != null) return "found btn-continue"; } var pm = GameObject.Find("[PlayerManager]"); if (pm != null && pm.transform.childCount > 0) return "already in game"; return "unknown state"; } }
